sourceRef.citation: Abd. Rahim, Mukhlis Bakri, Muhammad Ridwan et al. 2026

statement.en: Tinjauan Hukum Islam terhadap Praktik Akad Utang Piutang Uang dengan Pelunasan Barang di Desa Lampasio Kecamatan Lampasio Kabupaten Tolitoli

proposer: Abd. Rahim, Mukhlis Bakri, Muhammad Ridwan

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The work is a legal-theological analysis of Islamic contract law (akad) applied to a specific debt-settlement practice in rural Indonesia. It combines jurisprudential interpretation (fiqh) with empirical observation of local practice. The truth-value is provisional: it depends on (1) acceptance within Islamic legal scholarship communities, (2) validation of fieldwork methodology, and (3) contextual applicability. No single determinate answer exists until peer review and scholarly consensus form. The document appears to be dated 2026 (future), suggesting preprint/provisional status.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 純粋な意図と等価物が隠れた利息を超えるとき、村の約束は聖なるものになる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 債務と物質が揺らぐ天秤で出会い、その間に正義の光が脈動する。
